calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Howell.
Clifford Y. Wang, Esq., counsel and Cantonese Interpreter for Petitioner: Huan Hong Ma, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Jing Yun Ma and Wen Hiu Ma. Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined. Father is not present but signed the petition.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Daisy Jing Ma.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Edmond Wen Ma.
Decree signed in open court.
